your (plural) oaths (possessed by the people being addressed)
they reach (referring to those who haven't reached puberty)
from you all (referring to the believers being addressed)
and when/and at the time (of تَضَعُونَ)
your clothes (referring to multiple people being addressed)
surely for you all (connected to يُبَيِّنُ - He makes clear)
any sin/blame (subject of ليس/there is not)
those who frequently go around (serving others)
some of you (subject, followed by عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ - upon others)
upon, on, over (connects بَعْضُكُمْ to بَعْضٍ)
He makes clear (Allah is the doer)
the signs/verses (object of يُبَيِّنُ - He makes clear)
and Allah (as the doer of يُبَيِّنُ - explains)
and when (connects this condition to previous rules)
just as (connects to ٱسْتَـْٔذَنَ - sought permission)
those who (referring to those mentioned before)
before them (referring to those who came earlier)
like that, thus (connects to يُبَيِّنُ - He makes clear)
and Allah (the one who shows signs in this ayah)
and the elderly women who remain at home (subject of لَيْسَ)
those who (feminine plural, subject of لَا يَرْجُونَ)
marriage (what they do not hope for)
that (introduces the clause يَضَعْنَ - they lay down)
their clothes (referring to elderly women mentioned earlier in the verse)
women who show off/display themselves (describing غَيْرَ)
And Allah (as the subject of سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ)
All-Knowing (as one of Allah's attributes mentioned with سَمِيعٌ/All-Hearing)
the blind person (subject of لَيْسَ عَلَى)
and not (negates حَرَجٌ 'difficulty' for ٱلْأَعْرَجِ 'the lame')
upon/against (showing no blame is upon الْأَعْرَجِ - the lame)
upon the sick person (object of عَلَى)
from (connects بُيُوت houses to تَأْكُلُوا۟ eat)
or (connecting options in بُيُوتِكُمْ 'your houses' and بُيُوتِ ءَابَآئِكُمْ 'houses of your fathers')
houses of (connected to أُمَّهٰتِكُمْ - your mothers)
or (connecting the houses/places you can eat from)
of houses (possessed by ءَابَآئِكُمْ - your fathers)
of houses (possessed by ءَابَآئِكُمْ - your fathers)
or (connecting بُيُوت/houses in a list of choices)
your paternal aunts (in بيوت عَمَّاتِكُمْ - houses of your paternal aunts)
or (connecting بُيُوتِ/houses in a list of choices)
or (connecting بُيُوت/houses in a list of choices)
what/that which (connects to مَلَكْتُم - you possess)
all together (describing how something is done)
or (connecting بُيُوتِ/houses in a list of choices)
houses (as the object being entered in دَخَلْتُم)
your own selves (referring to multiple people being addressed)
a greeting (object of فَسَلِّمُوا - so give greetings)
a very good/pure/pleasant thing (describing تَحِيَّةً - greeting)
like that (referring to the previous rules mentioned)
Allah (subject of يُبَيِّنُ - He makes clear)
you all use your minds to understand
those who (refers to believers mentioned in ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ)
in/by Allah (object of يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe)
and when (introducing a likely future event)
with him (refers to being with رَسُولِهِۦ - His Messenger)
upon/on (with extra emphasis on أَمْرٍ - matter)
those who (subject of يَسْتَـْٔذِنُونَكَ - they ask your permission)
in/by/with Allah (object of belief in ءَامَنُوا۟)
so when/and then when (connects to يَسْتَـْٔذِنُونَكَ - they ask your permission)
then give permission! (command to Prophet ﷺ)
and seek forgiveness! (command to Prophet ﷺ)
for them (connected to فَأْذَن - so give permission)
Allah (as the object being believed in)
indeed/verily (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ)
Allah (as the object being asked to forgive them)
do not (command to not do تَجْعَلُوا۟)
you all make/turn (something into something) (command not to do this with دُعَآءَ ٱلرَّسُولِ)
the act of calling (object of تَجْعَلُوا)
like the calling (of بَعْضِكُم - some of you)
he knows (subject of قَدْ at start of sentence)
Allah (as the subject of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
those who (referring to people who يَتَسَلَّلُونَ/slip away)
stealthily, secretly (describing how they slip away)
then let him be cautious (in response to يَتَسَلَّلُونَ - they slip away)
those who/which (describing يَتَسَلَّلُونَ - those who slip away)
that it strikes them (referring to فِتْنَةٌ or عَذَابٌ)
a trial/affliction (subject of تُصِيبَهُمْ - hits/afflicts them)
or (connecting تُصِيبَهُمْ فِتْنَةٌ with عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ)
that it afflicts them (referring to فِتْنَةٌ or عَذَابٌ)
in/within (location in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
of the heavens/skies (specifically those belonging to Allah)
and of the earth/land (connected to ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
what/that which (referring to what you are upon)
you all (when talking to a group)
upon him/on him (referring back to what is in the heavens and earth)
and (on) the day (when they will be returned)
they are being returned (referring to those who deny Allah's knowledge)
to him, towards him (referring back to اللَّهِ)
and then he will inform them (about عَمِلُوا۟ what they did)
they did/worked (subject of يُنَبِّئُهُم - He will inform them)
And Allah (as the subject of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
